description.zh-Hans: 生成由宽阔流带、离散浅水边、断续泡沫和涟漪色块构成的可平铺RPG水流，不使用逐像素连续噪声。
description.en: Generates seamless RPG water flow from broad directional bands, discrete shallow edges, broken foam, and ripple clusters rather than continuous per-pixel noise.

triggers.zh-Hans: 水流, 流水, 水面, 河流, 波浪, 流体, 水面纹理
triggers.en: water flow, stream, river, wave, fluid, water surface

exampleUsage.zh-Hans: 生成流水/流体纹理，用于河流、海洋或水边场景的地面材质。
exampleUsage.en: Generate flowing water textures for rivers, oceans, or water-side scene ground materials.
